metric_note.quality_jaccard: token-set Jaccard similarity against baseline text for same prompt_id and seed
metric_note.ttft_seconds: time from request send to first streamed content token
metric_note.prefill_latency_seconds: time from request send to first streamed content token
metric_note.decode_latency_seconds: time from first streamed content token to end of stream
metric_note.e2e_latency_seconds: time from request send to end of stream
metric_note.itl_mean_ms: mean inter-token latency (ms) between streamed content chunks
metric_note.itl_p50_ms: p50 inter-token latency (ms) between streamed content chunks
metric_note.itl_p95_ms: p95 inter-token latency (ms) between streamed content chunks
metric_note.tier_delta_gpu_hits: change in cumulative KT tier gpu_hits during this request
metric_note.tier_delta_cpu_hits: change in cumulative KT tier cpu_hits during this request
metric_note.tier_delta_ssd_loads: change in cumulative KT tier ssd_loads during this request
metric_note.tier_delta_promotions_to_gpu: change in cumulative KT tier promotions_to_gpu during this request
metric_note.tier_delta_promotions_to_cpu: change in cumulative KT tier promotions_to_cpu during this request
metric_note.tier_delta_demotions_from_gpu: change in cumulative KT tier demotions_from_gpu during this request
metric_note.tier_delta_demotions_from_cpu: change in cumulative KT tier demotions_from_cpu during this request
metric_note.tier_delta_ssd_load_rate: tier_stats_delta.ssd_loads / (gpu_hits + cpu_hits + ssd_loads) for this request
metric_note.tier_layers_seen: number of MoE layers contributing request-scoped tier stats
metric_note.ssd_load_ratio: tier_stats_delta.ssd_load_rate / baseline tier_stats_delta.ssd_load_rate for same prompt_id
